# Ethan Qiu — Now

> Live, auto-updated status page for Ethan Qiu (software engineer, Toronto).
> Regenerated hourly from GitHub and WakaTime activity plus a hand-maintained status block.

## Pages

- [Now (markdown)](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/now.md): current role, availability, active projects, and this week's coding activity
- [Now (JSON)](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/now.json): the same data, structured

## Other resources

- [Portfolio](https://ethanqiu.ca): projects, experience, and contact info
- [Resume (PDF)](https://ethanqiu.ca/resume.pdf): canonical resume
- [GitHub](https://github.com/qiuethan): public code
